title: [slang] Testing error when switching to slang master branch

features.name: constant index bit-select on multi-bit wire as ref port connection
features.description: Code should include a multi-bit wire net where a constant index bit-select is used as an output/ref port connection in a module instantiation, particularly with an index value >= 2 on a net wider than 2 bits

features.name: multiple bit-selects on same net in single module instantiation
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation that connects multiple distinct constant-index bit-selects of the same multi-bit net to different output ports of the same instance

features.name: module with output ref ports accepting net bit-selects
features.description: Code should include a module definition whose output ports are connected by the caller using constant-index bit-selects of wider wire nets, causing the importer to generate static extract_ref operations
